top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS legality_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
AND (l.format = 'Banned' OR l.format = 'Restricted');

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS banned_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id AND l.format = 'Commander' AND l.status = 'Banned'
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams';

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS legality_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
AND (l.format = 'Banned' OR l.format = 'Restricted');

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS legality_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
AND (l.status = 'Banned' OR l.status = 'Restricted');

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS legality_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
AND (l.format = 'Banned' OR l.format = 'Restricted');

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS banned_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id AND l.format = 'Commander' AND l.status = 'Banned'

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS banned_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid AND l.format = 'Commander' AND l.status = 'Banned'
WHERE c.artist LIKE '%Allen Williams%';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion AS frame_style, c.faceName AS card_name, l.status AS legality_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
AND (l.format = 'Banned' OR l.format = 'Restricted');
